title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cars24 family as a Senior Software Engineer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
